rationale: In the citing paper, Kaiser, Schreier, and Janiszewski (2017) appears as part of a grouped introductory citation supporting a broad claim that aesthetic customization can help consumers express uniqueness. The paper does not single out this source for a specific mechanism, hypothesis, measure, or empirical design choice. Its core resale-value theorizing and tests proceed independently, so this citation functions as general background rather than a meaningful building block.
